headline: Zebra (ZBRA) Down 12.2% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Rebound?
summary: Zebra (ZBRA) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) Expands Enterprise Software Offering With New AI Platforms
summary: With a forward P/E of 12.45x and upside potential of 44.30%, Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ:ZBRA) ranks among the top 10 lowest forward P/E stocks in the S&P 500. A beat-and-raise quarter, fresh software launches, and back-to-back analyst target hikes have kept Zebra Technologies Corporation (NASDAQ:ZBRA) in the spotlight heading into the second half of 2026. […]
